sourceName: HUD Small Area Fair Market Rents 2026 - Bay Area FMR Area ZIP Metrics
category: Aggregate small area fair market rents
jurisdiction: San Francisco Bay Area HUD FMR/MSA areas
notes: Official HUD Open Data ArcGIS table for FY2026 Small Area Fair Market Rents. This config imports ZIP/ZCTA-level rent and payment-standard values for Bay Area-related HUD FMR/MSA areas. It does not request geometry, addresses, people, households, owners, contacts, parcel records, property names, or resident records.
